message:
feat(scheduler): add local/remote allocation ratio telemetry to NUMA slab diagnostics

The NUMA slab telemetry JSON previously reported only raw cross_node_allocs,
requiring consumers to compute local-vs-remote allocation ratios themselves.
This commit adds pre-computed ratio fields for easier diagnostics.

Changes:
- Add ratio_basis_points() helper: computes ratios as basis points (0-10000)
  using u128 intermediate to avoid overflow on large allocation counts.
  Returns 0 for zero denominators and caps at RATIO_SCALE_BPS on overflow.
- Derive local_allocs and remote_allocs (clamped to total_allocs) in as_json()
- Add allocation_ratio_bps object with scale, local, and remote fields
- Extend existing tests to verify: 50/50 split yields 5000/5000 bps,
  all-local yields 10000/0 bps, scale is always 10000

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
